message:
style(dashboard): apply gofmt formatting to commands and history panel

Fix formatting issues detected by gofmt:

internal/tui/dashboard/commands.go:
- Add missing newline at end of file

internal/tui/dashboard/panels/history.go:
- Remove trailing whitespace from blank lines
- Fix spacing around arithmetic operators (width-2 vs width - 2)
- Expand single-line if statement to multi-line form for clarity:
  if maxPrompt < 10 { maxPrompt = 10 }
  →
  if maxPrompt < 10 {
      maxPrompt = 10
  }

These changes ensure consistent code style across the dashboard package
and pass gofmt -l verification.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
